assessment.note: Delegation strategy is reactive rather than planned, indicating a lack of growth in leadership skills.

new_queue.label: CoE support
new_queue.name: What's needed to effectively run the CoE with your current resources?
new_queue.description: Explores what support or resources Carl needs to manage the CoE effectively.

new_queue.label: Workload impact
new_queue.name: How do you feel your workload is affecting your ability to innovate and propose new ideas?
new_queue.description: Explores the impact of workload on Carl's creativity and initiative.

new_queue.label: Delegation improvement
new_queue.name: What would help you plan delegation more proactively, rather than day-to-day?
new_queue.description: Seeks to identify what Carl needs to improve his delegation strategy.

new_queue.label: Impact of priorities
new_queue.name: How do these priorities align with the outcomes you're aiming for?
new_queue.description: Assesses whether Carl's stated priorities are aligned with desired outcomes.
